description_long: This chaise features a sleek, modern design with a continuous, flowing seat and backrest that forms an elegant S-shaped curve. The surface is upholstered in a smooth, rich brown material, likely leather or high-quality synthetic, providing a luxurious appearance. A single, rectangular headrest cushion is attached at the upper end, offering additional comfort and support for the head and neck. The chaise is supported by a minimalist black metal frame, with two sturdy legs positioned to provide stability while maintaining an open, airy look. The absence of armrests and the ergonomic contouring make it ideal for lounging in urban parks, upscale public spaces, or contemporary outdoor settings. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A modern, S-shaped brown chaise with a smooth surface, attached headrest, and minimalist black metal frame. Its ergonomic, flowing design is both stylish and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, continuous seat and backrest with the attached headrest cushion, highlighting the chaise's inviting surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elegant S-shaped curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the supporting black metal frame and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the headrest and the supporting frame, emphasizing the chaise's structural simplicity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the S-shaped profile and frame, showing the headrest's attachment and the chaise's overall contour.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a continuous extension of the seat, forming a smooth, ergonomic curve that rises to support the upper back and head. It features a single, attached rectangular headrest cushion for added comfort, with no visible segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are minimalist, straight, and constructed from black metal, forming a sturdy frame that supports the chaise while maintaining a modern, open appearance. There are no decorative elements visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid brown with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, attached rectangular headrest cushion positioned at the top of the backrest. No additional loose or layered cushions are visible.
